description.intro: The adidas Predator League FT FG/MG are the ideal choice for players seeking versatility and precision on firm ground and modern artificial turf. Featuring a fold-over tongue structure and dynamic design, these boots offer a secure fit and precise strikes in every play.
key_benefits: Versatility across surfaces: Sole optimized for firm natural grass and next-generation artificial turf
Enhanced striking power: Textured strike zones boost shot force and accuracy
Comfortable and secure fit: Flexible synthetic upper with lace-up system for distraction-free performance
Bold on-pitch presence: Striking white/light green colorway from the Radiant Blaze Pack
description.subtitle: Football boots with fold-over tongue adidas FG/MG for firm natural grass and artificial turf - white and light green
description.tagline: Total control on every playing surface

technical_details.range: Mid-range / League level – excellent balance of performance, durability, and value for regular training and matches
technical_details.sole_type: FG/MG (Firm Ground / Multi-Ground) – Controlplate outsole with nylon/rubber studs
